caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, black headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS" in gold lettering sits at a desk in a studio setting. He wears a gold chain and a gold watch on his left wrist. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm and a black table. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring the repeated words "ORIGINAL HUSTLE" alongside yellow stars. A blue sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the table sits a black container with red and white text that includes "TALK OUT". Throughout the sequence, the man is smiling and laughing; in some moments, he gestures with his right hand open toward the side while leaning slightly forward. The scene remains static in composition, with the only movement being the man's facial expressions and hand gestures as he interacts with someone off-screen.
